Consent to the Use of Electronic Records and Signatures

This "Consent to the Use of Electronic Records and Signatures" (this "Consent") is provided by Guaranteed Rate, Inc. ("we," "us," or the "Lender") to Michelle Ady (you) in connection with loan number 263423294 and the promissory note dated 2012-10-10 (Loan Number: N/A) (together, the "Loan"). This Consent may be updated from time to time and apply to any future transactions, not just this one. Please read Consent carefully and retain a copy for your records. By proceeding electronically, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to the terms set forth herein.

1. SCOPE OF YOUR CONSENT  
Your consent applies to all records and communications that we, our affiliates, or our service providers, and you subsequently agree to be provided or made available to you in electronic format. This may include, by way of example but not limited to, all disclosures, agreements, notices, and other communications related to your application, loan, and servicing of your account (collectively, "Communications"). 

2. ELECTRONIC SIGNATURES  
You agree that when you sign any application, agreement, disclosures acknowledgment, or other documents provided to you in electronic form, such signature has the same legal effect as if you had signed it in paper form with your handwritten signature and will be enforceable against you. All documents you sign electronically will be considered original documents, even if they are only in electronic form. 

3. HARDWARE AND SOFTWARE REQUIREMENTS  
To access Communications, you must have: (1) a computer or other device with internet access; (2) a current web browser that supports 128-bit encryption; (3) a valid email address; and (4) an electronic storage capability (e.g., a hard drive, a cloud storage service, etc.) that allows you to save Communications. 

4. CONFIRMING YOUR ABILITY TO ACCESS  
Before you consent to receive Communications electronically, you should confirm that you are able to receive and access email Communications that will be sent to you. 

5. OBTAINING PAPER COPIES  
If you decide at any time to withdraw your consent, you have the right to request and receive a paper copy of any Communications that we have provided to you electronically. You can request a copy by contacting us by telephone at (123) 456-7890 at our main office located at 123 Main Street, Loan Town, PR 55511.

6. KEEPING YOUR CONTACT INFORMATION CURRENT You may update your contact information by telephone at 206-464-4987, by writing to us at 29 Wyman Spring, East Dham, PA 1501, or, if available, through your online account. We may also require you to provide a valid email address. Be sure to promptly inform us when your contact information changes.  If you give us incorrect information or do not notify us of any changes, you may not receive communications from us.  7. WITHDRAWING YOUR CONSENT You have the right to withdraw your consent to receive Communications electronically at any time. To withdraw your consent, you must notify us in writing. You can send your notification to the address provided in Section 6 above or by calling our Customer Service at 206-464-4987. If you withdraw your consent, we will send you a paper copy of Communications that we are otherwise required to send you under FIRA.  8. FEDERAL AND STATE LAW GOVERNING THIS CONSENT The Consent does not diminish the effect of any Non-standard clause that may also govern your agreement to receive documents electronically or to complete transactions electronically.  9. RECORDS RETENTION AND RELIABILITY We will maintain records consistent with applicable law and will retain any records that we are required to retain by law. You may request paper copies of any electronic Communications that you receive in writing to us, with a description of the specific Communications you seek. If we ask you for a description of the specific Communications, your request may be denied.  10. ACKNOWLEDGMENT AND AGREEMENT By providing your contact information and referencing loan number 296735893, you acknowledge and agree that you Consent to receive Communications electronically and that your Consent has the same effect as your handwritten signature. This Consent will remain in effect until we receive a written request from you to withdraw your consent. If you are currently using or have used a nondigital solution to agree to this policy, then this agreement will go into effect on January 22, 2021, and will remain in effect until we receive a written request from you to withdraw your consent.

Notice of Assignment, Sale, or Transfer of Servicing Rights
The sale of your mortgage loan and the servicing rights associated with it may transfer to a new owner. This notice provides information regarding the transfer of such rights.

1.  IMPORTANT MESSAGES
- If your loan is transferred, you will receive a notice providing the new lender and their contact information.
- You will not experience a change in the terms of your mortgage loan as a result of this transfer.

2.  WHO IS RESPONSIBLE?
- The new servicer assumes responsibility for managing your loan and processing payments.
- You must direct all payments and inquiries to the new servicer after the effective date of the transfer.

3.  WHAT SHOULD YOU DO?
- Ensure that you continue to make your payments on time.
- Update any automatic payments or electronic payment arrangements directed to your old servicer.
